title: Opening external window when button pushed
excerpt: Does anyone know if there’s a way on a board when a button is pushed that and external window opens I want my team to be able to complete a questionnaire on the phone to someone but the questionnaire changes based on the…

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know if there’s a way on a board when a button is pushed that and external window opens I want my team to be able to complete a questionnaire on the phone to someone but the questionnaire changes based on their answer so I can’t simply use a Monday form

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Eda6195,

If the external window you want to open can be referenced by a URL, I would suggest trying a simple link column. If not, give us more details. Maybe we can figure it out.
